title: Defaitiste's Fault [16x]
description: A purple themed default edit made for pvp
body:
The Defaitiste's Fault is a 1.8.9 purple themed default edit made mainly for bedwars.

it is mostly made from vanilla textures but important textures such as the GUI, the swords and tools are edited in a purple pvp-ish theme.

It was made around my old username aesthetics witch was kinda similar to viprah's.

Here are some ingame screenshots to show the pack :)

![Defaitiste's Fault prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8819322566265be318c670418f2fdd0a5c63b1d3.jpeg)

![Defaitiste's Fault prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/273e89fa8e875aa9555e5e0bdbfe48685b4f062c.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
